name: get_grades
description: Retrieve the grades and enrollment details for a specific user in a course. Returns current score, final score, and grade information. Instructors can view any student's grades; students can view their own.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Filter to a specific user's enrollment. Use 'self' for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: type[]
parameters.description: Filter by enrollment type: StudentEnrollment, TeacherEnrollment, TaEnrollment.

parameters.name: state[]
parameters.description: Filter by enrollment state: active, invited, completed.
